Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x36DE "DEMOLITIONCONSTRUCTIONSET-36DE" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Demolition Construction Set (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Didn't use the tape version as that is frozen after the game has started. This is a problem as the init the routine at $0AA1 trashes itself.
